title: Persona 3 Reload Menu
body:
# Persona 3 Reload Menu
This mod aims to enhance all the minecraft menus starting from the main menu, doing so by getting inspired from Persona 3 Reload's amazing design Language.
This mod features:
- New animations
- New buttons layout
- New wallpaper

## Mod Demo:
